title: Newly imported tables not showing
description:
### What happens?

Hello,

Newly imported CSV files **_sometimes_** won't show up in the table list. But I am able to query the tables in question. Both CLI and duckdb node packages have the same issue.

### To Reproduce

When I import a file using the command with duckdb node package:

```sql
CREATE TABLE ${tableName} AS SELECT * FROM read_csv('${filePath}');
```

Newly created table won't show up in the list when using one of the following queries both in CLI and node package:
```sql
SHOW ALL TABLES;
SELECT * FROM information_schema.tables;
```

But I can list table content using the following query:
```sql
SELECT * FROM ${tableName};
```

### OS:

iOS

### DuckDB Version:

v1.0.0 1f98600c2c

### DuckDB Client:

Node, CLI

### Full Name:

Cemhan Yaşaraşkın

### Affiliation:

Freelance

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

No - I cannot share the data sets because they are confidential

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [ ] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (user_id UInt32, email String, age Nullable(UInt32) CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table_2 (user_id, email, age) VALUES (1, 'alice@example.com', 30), (2, 'bob@example.com', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table_1 JOIN test_table_2 ON test_table_1.id = test_table_2.user_id;
key_bug_features: Newly imported tables not appearing in the table list
